_provenance.source: E1.6: slim-14 clustered prune MINUS the 3 features not populated pre-2021
_provenance.reason: stuff_plus (FanGraphs 2020+ hard floor) + 2 sequential posteriors (Epic-16 backfill 2021+) are absent for the 2016-2020 extension seasons AND are the 3 lowest-importance signal features — drop them so the 2016+ training set needs NO era-wide imputation (methodologically clean exclusion, not fallback-mean fill)
